full_text:
Mei Cheng 梅成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mei Cheng (梅成). Bandit lord with Chen Lan, he feigned surrender to Yu Jin and revolted again. Mei Cheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom. Mei Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
